TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_rrkan, title = rrkan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/rrkan} }

S.FORM: rrkan qalang Tayal ga maki qu ngasal ruma, ngasal qhoniq, ngasal btunux, khu, ru rrkan. rrkan hya ga psrxun nha squ wagiq ru llaw rhzyal, traka nha mita paris ru mlahang qalang. kuwara qaniy hya ga ngasal kinbalay kinhmgan.

rrkan qalang Tayal ga maki qu ngasal ruma, ngasal qhoniq, ngasal btunux, khu, ru rrkan. rrkan hya ga psrxun nha squ wagiq ru llaw rhzyal, traka nha mita paris ru mlahang qalang. kuwara qaniy hya ga ngasal kinbalay kinhmgan.
S.PHON: rrkan qalaŋ tajal ɣa maki qu ŋas~ɕal ruma, ŋas~ɕal qħoniq, ŋas~ɕal βtunux, kħu, ru rrkan. rrkan ħja ɣa ps~ɕrxun nħa s~ɕqu waɣiq ru llaw rħzjal, traka nħa mita paris~ɕ ru mlaħaŋ qalaŋ. kuwara qanij ħja ɣa ŋas~ɕal kinβalaj kinħmɣan.
